title: Paul Goddard
compiled_truth: Paul Goddard is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-05-27 to 2002-02-04), Paul Goddard sent 13 and received 246 emails, totalling 259 interactions. Top correspondents: [Justin Boyd](people/justin-boyd) (10), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (9), [Dave Samuels](people/dave-samuels) (5), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (4), [Rahil Jafry](people/rahil-jafry) (4).
